name: Liberty Financial Group
analysis: LFG has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.2300, stop A$3.0492, target A$3.5636 (1.85:1) — then trail it.
